approvalStep.description: Assign to Operations Manager for Supervisor

entryCriteria.formula: AND( CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,"Supervisor"), OR( ((ISPICKVAL(CC_DailyRate__c ,"Regular") || ISPICKVAL(CC_DailyRate__c ,"Premium") || ISPICKVAL(CC_DailyRate__c ,"Competitive vehicle") )&& (CC_TotalRentalDaysProvidedByAgent__c + CC_TotalRentalDaysProvidedByDealer__c ) > 20) , ISPICKVAL(CC_DailyRate__c ,"Other (special circumstances)") ) )

approvalStep.label: Level 1
approvalStep.name: Step_2

ApprovalProcess.description: NAFTA 4 CC-544 Approval process created for Rental Car Requests when the creating user is from Canada market and the status of the rental car request is submitted(for Non Premium Vehicles).
ApprovalProcess.label: Canada Rental Car Request Non Premium
